title: APAC: Automatic Parallelisation of C++ Using OpenMP Task Dependencies
description: APAC is a source-to-source compiler that automatically transforms sequential C++ programs into parallel code using OpenMP task dependencies. It analyses data dependencies between statements and rewrites the source with #pragma omp task depend(...) directives.

creators.name: Gaupp, Julien
